title: protac_v1 — PROTAC sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/protac_sim.py. One row per PROTAC degrader: the mass-action binary equilibria (POI-warhead, E3-warhead), the ternary-complex cooperativity factor alpha with apparent K_d,ternary = K_d(E3)/alpha, the hook-effect ternary-fraction peak across a fixed [PROTAC] grid, and the ubiquitin-transfer-gated degradation drive. PROTAC is a SUB-AXIS :> BIFUNCTIONAL (expansion-main, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape @D sub_under_bifunctional) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

protac.description: PROTAC identifier within the deterministic panel.

e3_ligase.description: E3 ubiquitin ligase recruited (e.g. CRBN, VHL).

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

alpha_cooperativity.description: Ternary-complex cooperativity factor: >1 positive, =1 none, <1 negative.

transfer_efficiency.description: Geometric competence surrogate for POI-lysine -> E2~Ub presentation, in [0,1].

ternary_profile.description: Ternary-complex fraction across the fixed [PROTAC] concentration grid.

ternary_fraction.description: Fraction of POI in the productive ternary complex.

ternary_fraction_peak.description: Maximum ternary-complex fraction over the [PROTAC] grid.

protac_at_peak_nM.description: [PROTAC] at which the ternary fraction peaks (nM).

hook_effect_present.description: True iff the ternary-fraction peak is interior to the grid (non-monotone hook effect).
